achievements: Full 4-role auth system (Admin/Cashier/Delivery/Customer) with Google OAuth gating, role-based redirects, and server-side guards — Phases 1–1.3.D complete
Admin dashboard fully built: KPI cards, menu CRUD, ingredient stock, employee management (cashier + delivery roles), orders view, customers list, revenue page, 'Suq Editorial' visual design
Cashier dashboard: live orders panel with realtime subscription, new-order flow (dine-in/takeaway/delivery), inventory alert banner, correct 4-value status enum
Delivery dashboard (Phase 3.5): mobile-first panel, optimistic UI, per-card errors, RLS policies audited and confirmed, realtime subscription
Chatbot order flow E2E verified: two-phase AI extraction, name→UUID resolution, order+order_items insert, users_insights upsert, success card with real orderId
Customer-facing: landing page, /menu with cart, profile page with order history + status filter chips, site header with avatar dropdown
SaaS service landing page at root / (hero, features, pricing, request form with PDF upload to Supabase Storage)
Auth hardening: fixed Google OAuth redirect URL (host-derived, not env-var), reset 6 test account passwords, fixed admin layout role guard (DB query not RPC)
n8n WhatsApp workflow corrected to match real schema (v_menu view, order_items table, users_insights rename)
improvements: anatomy.md is nearly empty — only 6 files described out of ~60+ files in the project. Run a scan to populate it so future sessions can navigate efficiently without cold reads

cerebrum.md shows 'Last updated: 2026-05-24' but major learnings (users_insights rename, host-derived OAuth URL, admin layout RPC bug) happened after that. Update the header date and add missing learnings
test-tasks.md was created 2026-05-31 with QA findings but sections 3+ (Cashier, Delivery, Chatbot, Admin) are untested — consolidate findings before they go stale
app/api/storage/sign-upload/route.ts is duplicated in anatomy.md (two entries, same directory). Clean up the stale entry

The root app/page.tsx redirects staff to dashboards and shows ServiceLandingPage to unauthenticated users — customers are redirected to /menu. Verify this dual-purpose root does not break the Back-to-form button on /login?back=1 that the landing page sets up
Admin revenue page (app/admin/revenue/page.tsx) was created but never explicitly QA'd — confirm the timezone handling via lib/time.ts renders correctly in Egypt (Africa/Cairo, UTC+2/+3)
Loading skeletons exist for admin pages but not for /cashier, /delivery, or /profile — add them for consistent perceived performance
next_tasks: Phase 7.1 E2E QA: run through all 12 unchecked test scenarios in tasks.md (all 4 role login flows, admin CRUD, cashier order lifecycle, chatbot delivery order, delivery cancel path) using Chrome DevTools MCP
Phase 7.2 RTL/i18n audit: verify English toggle on delivery and profile pages, check chevron/arrow icon mirroring, audit allergen badges in RTL

Phase 7.3 Security audit: confirm no secrets in client bundle (especially SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY), audit /api/orders and /api/chat for auth checks, verify RLS blocks cross-role reads via Supabase SQL editor

Phase 7.4 Deployment: configure Vercel project, set production env vars (Supabase, OpenRouter, Google OAuth redirect), configure next.config.ts images.remotePatterns for Unsplash, deploy and smoke test
Complete test-tasks.md sections 3–5 (Cashier dashboard QA, Delivery dashboard QA, Chatbot order flow QA) — annotate pass/fail and fix any regressions before deploying
Update CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md to reflect the SaaS service landing page addition and the users_insights rename (still references 'chatbot_insights' in some places)
risks: CRITICAL — users_insights rename: the n8n WhatsApp workflow was fixed 2026-05-27 to reference users_insights, but it was never E2E tested end-to-end in a real WhatsApp flow. If the table name or field names diverge, orders placed via WhatsApp will silently fail to insert
HIGH — No automated tests: the entire test suite is manual (test-tasks.md). Any regression introduced during Phase 7 deployment prep will only be caught by a manual QA pass — there is no safety net

HIGH — Service landing page + restaurant app share the root route: the proxy.ts was patched to allow anonymous access to `/` but the restaurant customer flow (auth → /menu) depends on correct redirects. A proxy logic bug could expose the restaurant app to unauthenticated users or break customer login

MEDIUM — Chatbot delivery guard (Task 5.2.A marked done) and editable prefill (5.2.B marked done) have no E2E verification screenshot in memory — the checkmarks may be optimistic. Task 5.2.C E2E verification is also marked done but no screenshot evidence exists in memory log

MEDIUM — SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY is used server-side in lib/actions/admin.ts for employee creation/deletion. If this ever leaks to the client bundle (e.g., through an accidental 'use client' import), it would give full DB access to anyone. Phase 7.3 security audit must explicitly check this

LOW — Unsplash remote images: next.config.ts images.remotePatterns for Unsplash is listed as a deployment task (7.4) but is not yet configured. Production build may fail or images may be blocked if this is missed
